case_title: MEGAN DORE LENEYO VS. LYFT, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-06-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENEY, MEGAN DORE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LINDSAY KRUEGER, PARALEGAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $982.89 FILED BY LENEY, MEGAN DORE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENEY, MEGAN DORE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MEGAN DORE LENEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC., REPRESENTED BY LINDSAY KRUEGER, PARALEGAL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
